breakdown: This PR fixes level-up and XP synthesis regressions by removing a duplicate local function (`_extract_xp_from_player_data`) in favor of the canonical `extract_character_xp`, and updating reward synthesis to prioritize `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries. The refactoring reduces code duplication and improves maintainability. Strong test coverage exists for the removed function's behavior.
key_changes: Remove duplicate `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function and replace with canonical `extract_character_xp`
Update `_synthesize_generic_rewards_box` to prioritize `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries over rewards_pending
Change `_check_and_set_level_up_pending` to call `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending` instead of implementation function
Add defensive `isinstance` checks for combat_summary/encounter_summary before accessing xp_awarded
Update all call sites in `_handle_update_state_command` and level check logic
